sections.section_purpose: To provide detailed pricing information as required by the tender.
sections.response_guidance: Complete the pricing schedule as specified in the tender. Include pricing on the basis of Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M, Time and Materials, Combination of T&M and Fixed Price, or Other. Reference annexes where required.

sections.section_purpose: To address compliance with legal and contractual obligations.
sections.response_guidance: State acceptance of, or proposed deviations from, the draft contract terms. Ensure compliance with legal requirements such as unpaid employee entitlements and Workplace Gender Equality Act. Manage Intellectual Property as per the Work Order.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the project management approach and performance management.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the project management methodology, governance structure, and reporting approach. Include how performance will be reviewed and managed.

sections.section_purpose: To demonstrate past performance and technical merit.
sections.response_guidance: Provide two or more case studies demonstrating relevant experience. Highlight methodology, past performance, and technical merit.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the approach to transition and compliance with AIC obligations.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the approach to transition-in and, if applicable, transition-out. Include completion and submission of AIC Schedule or Plan as required.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the technical approach and planning requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the proposed technical approach to meet the stated requirements. Provide each Plan in accordance with the COD and Work Order.

sections.section_purpose: To ensure proper submission process is followed.
sections.response_guidance: Detail the electronic lodgement process via AusTender, ensuring compliance with the specified procedures and deadlines.
